House of Profession : Saturn is the Lord of Profession.
The Planetary Combination of 2nd, 5th, 9th, 7th Signs is Primary
Concern to Saturn.
House of Husband : Mars is the Lord ofthis House. The
prediction, is told from the Planetary Combination of 2nd, 5th, 7th,
9th to him (from female chart)'

House of Wife : Venus is the Lord of this House. The
Combination of planets with Venus and Planets posited in the 2nd,
5th, 7th, 9th will indicate the Husband, Nature and Profession.
